description:
Plan every workout, log every set in seconds, and see exactly why your strength is—or isn’t—improving.

StreakReps brings structured strength training, recovery context, routes, and meaningful progress into one focused experience for iPhone and Apple Watch. No spreadsheets. No guessing what you lifted last time.

KNOW WHAT TO TRAIN TODAY
Build a custom gym or home plan, or start with ready-made programs for strength, hypertrophy, full body, push-pull-legs, and more. Set training days, equipment, exercises, sets, rep ranges, rest, and progression before the session starts.

LOG SETS WITHOUT LOSING FOCUS
Record weight, reps, RPE, rest, notes, warm-ups, and completed sets in a fast workout flow. Previous performance stays close, so progressive overload becomes a clear next action instead of a calculation.

SEE PROGRESS APPLE FITNESS DOESN’T SHOW
Understand weekly volume, consistency, streaks, personal records, estimated 1RM, exercise history, strength trends, and muscle balance. Spot momentum, plateaus, and neglected muscle groups with visual dashboards built for resistance training.

CONNECT YOUR APPLE ECOSYSTEM
With your permission, StreakReps reads and writes compatible Apple Health data, including workouts, activity, body metrics, and recovery signals. Completed workouts can live alongside your activity in Health and Fitness, while Apple Watch lets you follow the session and log sets from your wrist. Widgets, Live Activities, Siri Shortcuts, and App Intents keep training one tap away.

GO BEYOND THE GYM FLOOR
Record outdoor and mixed sessions with live GPS routes, distance, pace, speed, heart rate, elevation, and splits. Review the route and workout history together instead of scattering the story across multiple apps.

TRAIN WITH RECOVERY CONTEXT
Bring sleep, HRV, resting heart rate, activity, and training load beside your plan. StreakReps helps you decide when to push, maintain, recover, or deload while keeping the decision in your hands.

BUILT FOR REAL TRAINING
• Custom gym and home workout plans
• Fast set, rep, weight, RPE, and rest logging
• Strength trends, PRs, 1RM, volume, and consistency
• Visual muscle map and exercise filters
• Training load and recovery context
• GPS routes, pace, elevation, heart rate, and splits
• Apple Health, Fitness, Watch, widgets, and Live Activities
• Calendar, workout history, share cards, and JSON export

STREAKREPS PRO
Unlock advanced analytics, configurable progression, privacy-conscious iCloud backups, share cards, and expanded training tools. Health and route data remain protected according to Apple platform rules.

Train with a plan. Finish with proof. Build a streak that means progress.

Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
promotionalText: Plan, lift and progress with recovery insights, GPS routes, Apple Health, Fitness and Watch—plus the strength trends Apple Fitness doesn’t show.
